info.title: Google Ads Service
info.description: Wraps the Google Ads API (v23) for MCC agency management. Handles OAuth, account linking, campaign CRUD, and performance reporting.

RunId.name: x-run-id
RunId.description: Caller's run ID from runs-service (used as parentRunId when creating a child run)

FeatureSlug.name: x-feature-slug
FeatureSlug.description: Feature slug for tracking which feature triggered the request

BrandId.name: x-brand-id
BrandId.description: Comma-separated list of brand UUIDs (e.g. "uuid1,uuid2,uuid3"). Forwarded to all downstream service calls.

AudienceId.name: x-audience-id
AudienceId.description: Audience attribution UUID (the campaign's priority audience). Present on campaign-run node calls; forwarded to runs/billing/key cost declarations for per-audience cost attribution. Omitted outside the campaign flow.

get.summary: Generate Google OAuth2 URL for Google Ads scope
OAuth2 callback — exchanges code for refresh token and links accounts
List linked Google Ads accounts for an org
List campaigns for a Google Ads account
Get campaign performance metrics (impressions, clicks, conversions, CPA, ROAS)

post.summary: Duplicate a campaign for A/B testing

get.summary: List conversion actions for an account

post.description: Performs a web search using the Serper.dev API and returns organic results from Google's index.

post.summary: News search via Serper.dev (Google News index)
post.description: Performs a news search using the Serper.dev API and returns news results from Google's index.

get.summary: List connected Google accounts for the org
get.description: Returns the set of Google (Gmail) accounts the org has connected via OAuth. Sourced from google_oauth_tokens, scoped by x-org-id.

post.summary: Start Google CRM OAuth (Gmail + People readonly)
post.description: Generates a Google authorize URL with PKCE for the Gmail readonly + Contacts readonly scopes. Persists state + verifier in google_oauth_pending (10 minute TTL).

get.summary: Google CRM OAuth callback (Gmail + People readonly)
get.description: Exchanges code+PKCE for tokens, stores refresh token in google_oauth_tokens (one row per (org_id, google_account_email)).

post.summary: Start an async Gmail + People sync for all connected Google accounts of the org
post.description: Backfill (last GOOGLE_GMAIL_BACKFILL_DAYS for Gmail; full People connections) on first sync, delta thereafter using Gmail historyId and People syncToken. Idempotent: re-runs produce no duplicate rows. Returns 202 immediately with a jobId; the caller must poll GET /orgs/google/sync/{jobId} until status != 'running'.

get.summary: Get the status of an async sync job
get.description: Returns the current status (running | succeeded | failed) of a sync job. On success, summary is populated; on failure, error contains the error message. Lookup is org-scoped: jobs from other orgs return 404.

404.description: Sync job not found for this org

get.summary: List raw Gmail messages (bronze) for the org
List raw Google contacts (bronze) for the org

post.summary: Batch search — multiple queries in one call
post.description: Performs multiple web and/or news searches in parallel and returns all results.
